case_title: AUDREY MORTON VS. BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-04-2007. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-16-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. MAY-04-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-15-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-23-2007 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-26-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE FEB-09-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUN-14-2007.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR LAWRENCE ERROL KERN.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO CHRISTOPHER GUERRERO SET FOR AUG-23-2007 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUL-16-2007. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORTON, AUDREY AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-09-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-06-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-25-2007
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BAY AREA RAPID TRANSIT DISTRICT
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR DEBRA FINK BOGAARDS.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-15-2007 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-04-2007 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. THE MAR-26-2007 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ON 7/16/2007 IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR/DISMISSAL ON FILE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR# 7156 (212)
ARBITRATOR DOUGLAS GEORGE BOVEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-15-2007 THROUGH SEP-13-2007.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
